inline_comments.message: with this, do we also need the above 2?
align with line 41. Also lines below
This enhanced health check includes liveliness and readiness test as well hence above tests can be removed.
Alignment is correct. it looks a bit distorted because of long Documentation
I don't see any checks for database or diskspace.

Agree, also it is important here to test endpoints that are used for kubernetes container probes:
https://github.com/onap/oom/blob/master/kubernetes/cps/components/cps-core/values.yaml#L121
